mapper.select:
SELECT ro.repair_order_id, ro.repair_num, ro.status, ro.create_time, ro.repair_id, ro.tenant_id, ro.repair_area, ro.contact_name, ro.contact_phone FROM repair_order ro
AND ro.del_flag = 0
AND ro.repair_num like concat('%', #{repairNum}, '%')
AND ro.status = #{status}
ORDER BY ro.repair_time DESC
